overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a cowboy character walking through a historic Southern city resembling New Orleans. The character moves from a cobblestone street into a sunlit park plaza featuring an equestrian statue and lush tropical gardens.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic city street with cast iron balconies

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cobblestone street toward the large government building with a dome

notable_agents.action: woman in a long dress walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: large stone building with a central dome and American flag bunting
black wrought iron fence lining the sidewalk
irregular cobblestone pavement with metal drainage grates
red brick building with white trim and second-floor balcony
wooden park bench on the sidewalk
tropical palm trees lining the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit cobblestone street in a historic city, passing by a wooden bench and approaching a large government building with a prominent dome. The street is lined with cast iron fences and palm trees, with a brick townhouse visible on the right.

events.description: character walks through the open iron gate entering the park plaza

agents.ego_description: passing through the park gate and stepping onto the gravel path inside the plaza

notable_agents.action: man in a blue coat and hat leaning against the fence

entered.detail: ornate black iron park gate with stone pillars
white gravel walking path inside the park
circular flower beds with pink and purple blooms

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and enters a park through an ornate iron gate, transitioning from the cobblestone street to a gravel path. Inside, flower beds with colorful blooms line the path, and a man in a blue coat stands near the entrance fence.

scene_state.functional_zone: formal garden plaza with central monument

events.description: character begins circling around the equestrian statue to view it from different angles

agents.ego_description: walking through the park gardens and circling around the central equestrian statue

notable_agents.action: man sitting on a wooden bench reading a book

entered.detail: large bronze statue of a figure on a rearing horse on a stone pedestal

segments.scene_description: The character explores the sunlit park plaza, walking along gravel paths surrounded by dense palm trees and colorful flower beds. The character circles around a prominent equestrian statue in the center of the plaza, passing by people sitting on benches and enjoying the gardens, with the domed government building visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a historic city street into a lush, sunlit park plaza. It begins by trailing a character along a cobblestone road lined with cast iron fences and palm trees, passing a brick townhouse as they approach a large domed government building. As the character reaches an ornate iron gate, the scene transitions from the urban street to a gravel path bordered by vibrant flower beds and a man in a blue coat. The camera then expands into the open plaza, weaving through dense tropical greenery and colorful gardens while circling a prominent equestrian statue. Finally, the movement settles within the park's center, where people relax on benches with the distant dome of the government building still framing the horizon.
